description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a fenced rectangular yard, featuring a compact main building with a gable roof and a small porch area. The property is landscaped with several mature trees, flower beds, and a manicured lawn, providing a suburban residential feel. The house includes a visible driveway or carport, a patio with outdoor furniture, and a hot tub or round pool in the backyard. The fencing is uniform and gray, enclosing the entire property for privacy and security. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped on the sides and a few facing the front. The overall design is modern yet cozy, with a focus on outdoor living and garden aesthetics.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a gable roof, porch, and landscaped yard enclosed by a gray fence. Features include a patio, hot tub, mature trees, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, flower beds, and a clear view of the fenced yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway/carport, patio area with umbrella, hot tub, and more of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, hot tub, mature trees, and the back facade of the bungalow with grouped windows.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side garden, carport, porch, and a mix of trees and flower beds along the fence.
